title: Fix issues in GHA for building multi-arch image: `quay.io/podman/fcos:podman-next`
body:
### Issue Description

The current GHA in podman doesn't create a multi-arch `quay.io/podman/fcos:podman-next`. We do have a multi-arch image now at https://quay.io/repository/podman/fcos?tab=tags but that was created using GHA at: https://github.com/containers/automation_sandbox/actions/runs/6097256491/job/16544521868

Ensure GHA for fcos using podman-next is fixed in podman.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

NA

### Describe the results you received

NA

### Describe the results you expected

NA

```yaml
NA
```
